scripts.check:internal-urls: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const bad=/artifactory\.twitter\.biz|\.pdxc-it\.twitter\.biz|10\.0\.100\./;function scan(dir){for(const f of fs.readdirSync(dir)){const p=path.join(dir,f);if(fs.statSync(p).isDirectory()&&!['node_modules','dist','.git'].includes(f))scan(p);else if(/\.(json|lock|ya?ml|md|ts|tsx|js|py|sh|bash|example)$/.test(f)){const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(bad.test(c)&&!p.includes('CHANGELOG.md')){console.error('Internal URL leaked in:',p);process.exit(1);}}}}scan('.');console.log('No internal corporate URLs found in source (excluding CHANGELOG history).');"
